{
  "claims": [
    "Senator Shannon Grove stated that the California Employment Development Department (EDD) is the most mismanaged department in the country.",
    "Audits have found billions of dollars in fraud occurring within the EDD since last year's government shutdown.",
    "SB 39 aims to cut down on fraud committed by state prison inmates.",
    "Most states have already implemented policies to cross check unemployment assistance applications with state prison rolls.",
    "The California State Auditor has indicated that the EDD was poorly managed and vulnerable to fraud, especially during the COVID-19 pandemic.",
    "There has been a historical failure by the EDD to implement audit recommendations."
  ]
